global_principles.condition: all lodging, air, car service, meals, and other expenses for the same trip
global_principles.action: charge all related rows to the same project code after confirming with team members/calendar bookings

example.output_project: same project for all rows in that trip

global_principles.condition: amount < 0 or description starts with Refund/
global_principles.action: research original charge and mirror the original project, department, expense type, and description context

example.output: same project/department/expense type as original ORD-EWR charge

global_principles.condition: event/hotel receipt contains separately listed meals, lodging, venue fees, or multiple project allocations
global_principles.action: split into multiple rows with matching descriptions and respective amounts
use concise, consistent, meaningful wording with correct capitalization/spelling and only standard punctuation

description_formats.action: use Mgmt Mtg, BOD Mtg, Strategy Mtg, Portfolio Mtg, and similar consistent meeting terms
include airport routing or RT: route, meeting/trip purpose, and deal/company/event name at the end

description_formats.condition: expense_type == Meals and meal occurs while traveling without external guests
description_formats.action: use Travel Meal/<trip purpose>/<deal or company>

description_formats.condition: expense_type == Meals and business guests attended
description_formats.action: include meal type/purpose, attendee names as first-initial last-name where possible, guest count if applicable, and deal/company/event name at the end

description_formats.condition: local office meal and not group order
description_formats.action: use Working Lunch or Working Dinner, and use Overage/Personal on the personal split line
include origin-destination, trip purpose, and deal/company/event at the end, unless the row is a mandatory home/office policy format

description_formats.condition: car service is an early-arrival, work-late, or weekend commute
description_formats.action: use only approved formats and do not invent variants
use Inflight Wifi for flight wifi, otherwise describe the subscription and due-diligence purpose
use concise description with purpose and deal/event destination where applicable
examples: Luggage Transfer to LGA/Mgmt Mtg/Chemical Guys

expense_code_rules.condition: description contains Tkt Fee, Exch Tkt, or ticketing fee for a flight
fee relates to a hotel or lodging charge
fee relates to train, bus, boat, or other non-air transportation
expense_code_rules.action: set expense type to Other Travel
set expense type to Info Services

expense_code_rules.condition: expense type is Seminars or Seminars and Conferences

expense_code_rules.action: set expense type to Other unless a more specific code clearly applies

policy_rules.condition: car service arrival to office is after 7:00 AM
policy_rules.action: code to Personal / project 1008 and use Personal description

policy_rules.condition: car service office departure is before 7:30 PM on a weekday
policy_rules.action: code to Personal / project 1008 unless weekend policy applies

policy_rules.condition: local Working Lunch > 25 or local Working Dinner > 35
policy_rules.action: itemize overage to project 1008 with Employee ID and use Overage/Personal description

text_cleaning.action: replace 'Business' with 'Bus.' in business meal/car rental/fuel/parking contexts

text_cleaning.condition: expense_type == 'Car Service' and route separator appears as ' to '
text_cleaning.action: replace ' to ' with '-' and remove spaces around route dashes

text_cleaning.condition: expense_type == 'Lodging' and description starts with Bus.Lodging

comments_guidance.action: write concise notes with attendee names/orgs, total attendee count, refund/reschedule/late-charge context, and any other posting-relevant detail

example.input: Refund row with unclear original charge
example.output: Original ticket not found; verify project and expense coding before posting.

validation.action: flag and shorten description/vendor while preserving meaning

example.input: Long description and long vendor exceed Sage limit

validation.condition: description is missing route, meeting purpose, attendee/company, or deal/event name required for that expense type
